==Japanese Content== {{Year by category |m= |c=9 |d=2 |y=7 |cat=アジア |sortkey=あしあ }} [[Category:Categories needing translation of Japanese explanatory text]]

revision.comment: Removing from [[Category:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on .]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:

revision.comment: Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)

Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q18493943)
Bot: remove [[Category:categories missing wikidata]] (has wikidata link)
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)
